audit-core.command: npx nx lint @temp-nx/agency-shell && npx nx run @temp-nx/agency-shell:generate-seo && npx nx run @temp-nx/agency-shell:prerender && npx nx e2e @temp-nx/agency-shell-e2e --spec src/golden-scan.spec.ts && npx jiti scripts/generate-report.ts

audit.command: npx nx lint @temp-nx/agency-shell && npx jiti scripts/ensure-test-user.ts && npx nx run @temp-nx/agency-shell:generate-seo && npx nx run @temp-nx/agency-shell:prerender && npx nx e2e @temp-nx/agency-shell-e2e --spec src/golden-scan.spec.ts && npx nx e2e @temp-nx/agency-shell-e2e --spec src/admin-rbac.spec.ts && npx jiti scripts/cleanup-test-data.ts && npx jiti scripts/generate-report.ts
